series_metadata.series_title: Drug Free Workplace Positive Testing Process & Results
series_metadata.series_description: Consists of Federal & State Positive Drug/Alcohol Results, Refusal to Test, Return to Duty & Follow-Up results, alcohol test results 0.02 or greater & Return to Work Certificate, Chain of Custody Forms, monthly schedules, positive tracking log & agency testing notifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current year and five previous years ; Electronic: Retain current year and five previous years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
